name: naiveproxy
note: Apache-2.0. NaiveProxy is the anti-tracking architecture this server speaks. The server side is a Caddy plugin compiled in via xcaddy at image build time (see docker/caddy/Dockerfile); the client side is the naive binary bundled in the cool-tunnel client family. Both halves live under the klzgrad/naiveproxy project umbrella. The OK/NG check confirms the plugin is loaded into the running Caddy.
